name: Faux Leather Desk Mat Brown - Threshold™: Desk Pad Protector, Polyurethane, 18"x26"
description:
Upgrade your workspace with this Faux-Leather Desk Mat from Threshold™. This rectangular desk pad features a neutral brown faux-leather finish for easy coordination with any office or home decor. Designed to accommodate your work essentials in one spot, the stylish desk accessory protects your tabletop from scratches, and it also provides a smooth and comfortable surface that will let you enjoy writing, typing and browsing.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
